# Rivaa

Rivaa is an upcoming jewelry brand preparing to launch. The brand has an established logo and a purchased domain, indicating a readiness to go live. The coming soon page will serve as the brand's first digital touchpoint to generate excitement and anticipation ahead of the official launch.

Source: https://rivaa-8a11df7f.zappy5.app

---

## A first glimpse of Rivaa.


Rivaa is being crafted as a jewelry destination where festive craft, refined styling, and modern presence meet.



For engaged couples
For fashion-led celebrations
For premium ethnic styling



















## Designed for the moment before the room turns.


Rivaa captures the electric pause—the breath held between arrival and recognition. Each piece draws from heirloom artistry, reimagined with a contemporary confidence that commands attention. It is jewelry that doesn't just accessorize; it announces.


From the intricate sparkle of festive celebration to the quiet power of everyday elegance, our collections are built on a foundation of radiant craft. We believe in the transformative energy of adornment, creating pieces that feel both deeply personal and universally captivating.







Radiant Craft





Bridal Energy





Modern Ethnic Form






































### Launch Waitlist


Be the first to receive the exclusive Rivaa reveal. Sign up for early access to our debut collection of ethnic jewellery and festival jewelry, delivered straight to your inbox.









### Bridal Preview


Explore upcoming occasion-led styling for weddings and festivities. From statement earrings to ornate bangles, discover pieces designed to celebrate your most precious moments.









### Creator Access


Fashion influencers and content creators are invited to collaborate early. Join our inner circle for exclusive previews and co-creation opportunities before the official launch.






























## Be first when Rivaa opens.


Join the early list for launch updates, previews, and first access to the world of Rivaa.


Join the Waitlist














Where tradition meets timeless elegance — Rivaa crafts heirloom-worthy jewelry for life's most radiant moments.

## Uncover the Artistry Behind Every Piece — Rivaa

URL: https://rivaa-8a11df7f.zappy5.app/brand-story
Description: Dive into Rivaa&#39;s journey of crafting timeless ethnic jewellery. From intricate Kashmiri watches to bold bangles, discover the passion and tradition shaping every accessory. Be part of our story before we launch.

Uncover the Artistry Behind Every Piece — Rivaa












































Skip to main content

















- Products Products




- Home
- Brand Story
- Preview Gallery
- Contact
0













Products
























# The story beginning with Rivaa.


Rivaa is preparing to introduce jewelry made for meaningful entrances, festive rituals, and personal radiance.


























## Where celebration becomes adornment.



In the quiet hum before a wedding, the laughter of a festival, or the stillness of a personal milestone, Rivaa steps in. Our pieces are crafted not just to be worn, but to be felt — a tangible echo of the moments that shape us. We believe that ethnic jewellery is more than an accessory; it is the silent narrator of your most cherished stories.


Rooted in the rich tapestry of artisan tradition, every earring, bangle, and heirloom-inspired piece is a dialogue between the past and the present. We merge age-old craftsmanship with a refined, modern sensibility, creating festival jewelry that feels both timeless and daringly current. It is a celebration of texture, light, and the profound artistry of the human hand.


Selecting jewelry for a landmark moment is an emotional journey. It is about finding that singular piece which mirrors your inner radiance. At Rivaa, we honor this intimacy with a curation that prioritizes premium styling and enduring quality, ensuring that when you adorn yourself, you are not merely accessorizing — you are stepping into your own light.










## Our Principles


Guided by tradition, crafted for the modern muse. Each Rivaa piece embodies a philosophy where ornate heritage meets wearable elegance.











### Festive Geometry


We draw from the intricate symmetry of rangoli and temple architecture. Sharp facets and repeating patterns are softened into fluid, wearable silhouettes that celebrate the spirit of ethnic jewellery without overwhelming the wearer.









### Bridal Presence


Every collection is designed to command attention. We craft statement bangles and earrings that carry the weight of ceremony with a lightness of form, ensuring the bride feels powerful, not burdened, on her most important day.









### Premium Finish


Luxury lies in the details. From the smooth clasp of a bracelet to the polished back of a pendant, our commitment to exceptional craftsmanship ensures that every piece of festival jewelry feels as exquisite as it looks.









### Cultural Modernity


We bridge the gap between ancestral artistry and contemporary minimalism. Traditional motifs are reimagined with clean lines and negative space, creating jewelry that honors your roots while speaking to a global, modern aesthetic.




































"Jewelry should not only complete the look; it should remember the occasion."





Rivaa is being shaped around pieces that feel ceremonial, expressive, and unforgettable.


















Where tradition meets timeless elegance — Rivaa crafts heirloom-worthy jewelry for life's most radiant moments.

## Peek at Our Stunning Festival Jewelry Line — Rivaa

URL: https://rivaa-8a11df7f.zappy5.app/preview-gallery
Description: Get an exclusive first look at Rivaa&#39;s preview gallery. Admire upcoming earrings, bangles, and Kashmiri watches designed to elevate your festive wardrobe. Save your favorites and stay tuned for the drop.

Peek at Our Stunning Festival Jewelry Line — Rivaa












































Skip to main content

















- Products Products

- Brand Story
- Preview Gallery
- Contact
0


















# A moodboard before the reveal.


A curated visual atmosphere of sparkle, silk, ceremony, and Rivaa’s coming aesthetic.





Products




































## A Glimpse of Rivaa


Curated moods from our debut collection — an editorial preview of the artistry to come.












### Ruby Glow


A deep, passionate radiance that captures the warmth of heirloom rubies against gold.












### Emerald Silk


Cool, serene elegance inspired by the lush depth of Zambian emeralds on smooth silk.












### Saffron Ceremony


Golden-hour warmth and festive spirit, echoing the sacred glow of saffron-draped celebrations.












### Aubergine Evening


Mysterious and opulent, a mood of deep violet nights adorned with faceted amethyst treasures.
















### Silk-inspired warmth


Our palette begins with the soft, luminous glow of handwoven silk. Rivaa captures the gentle drape and iridescent sheen of Banarasi weaves, translating them into metal and enamel finishes that feel warm against the skin. Every piece carries the memory of loom and thread, reimagined for the modern jewelry lover.











### Gemstone color language


Emerald green, ruby red, and sapphire blue form the chromatic heart of Rivaa. We draw from the deep, saturated hues of uncut stones and the faceted brilliance of polki and kundan settings. This is not just color — it is a vocabulary of light, cut, and clarity that tells stories of heritage and celebration in every ethnic jewellery piece.











### Festive geometry


Rangoli motifs, jali screens, and temple architecture inspire the structural DNA of our designs. Intricate symmetry, repeating petals, and sacred mandalas are distilled into wearable forms. Rivaa jewelry becomes a personal talisman — a piece of festive geometry that moves with you, perfect for festival jewelry moments and everyday radiance alike.


















## Want the first reveal?





Join the early list and be notified when Rivaa’s full world is unveiled.


Join the Waitlist
→












Where tradition meets timeless elegance — Rivaa crafts heirloom-worthy jewelry for life's most radiant moments.

Description: Have questions or want VIP access to Rivaa&#39;s launch? Reach out today and be the first to experience our curated ethnic jewellery and accessories. We&#39;re ready to help you shine.

# Connect with Rivaa.


For launch updates, early access, collaborations, or help connecting the purchased domain to the coming-soon page, leave a message and the next steps can be shared clearly.











## Let's connect


Share your details and we'll be in touch before the launch.




Name




Email




Phone




Message






I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  |

Return Policy
and  Privacy Policy




Send Message










Launching soon


### Domain ready?


Already purchased a domain? It can be connected by pointing the domain DNS to the publishing platform once the page is ready. Share the domain name in your message if you would like guidance.




[business_email]

















## Who Should Reach Out


Rivaa is preparing to launch its debut collection of ethnic jewellery and accessories. If you belong to one of the groups below, we would love to connect before the big reveal.








### Engaged Couples


Brides and grooms searching for one-of-a-kind festival jewelry and bridal adornments that honor tradition with a modern silhouette.







### Fashion Influencers


Stylists and content creators who celebrate South Asian heritage through editorial looks and want early access to Rivaa's statement earrings and bangles.







### Premium Jewelry Collectors


Connoisseurs who appreciate artisanal craftsmanship, rare gemstone settings, and limited-edition Kashmiri watches that blend heritage with haute couture.







### Ethnic Styling Collaborators


Wardrobe consultants, event stylists, and cultural curators who pair Rivaa's accessories with festive ensembles for weddings, galas, and editorial shoots.













## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know about Rivaa's upcoming launch.





### When is Rivaa launching?


We are putting the final touches on our debut collection and plan to open our doors very soon. Sign up for the waitlist to be the first to know the exact date and receive an exclusive launch-day offer.




### Can I join the waitlist?


Absolutely. Joining our waitlist is the best way to secure early access to the collection, receive a special welcome gift with your first purchase, and stay updated on all things Rivaa.




### Will there be bridal-focused pieces?


Yes. Bridal and festive jewelry is at the heart of Rivaa. Our debut collection will feature statement pieces designed to make you shine on your most special occasions, with more bridal exclusives to follow.




### Can influencers collaborate before launch?


We love partnering with voices who share our passion for artistry and tradition. If you're interested in collaborating, please reach out through our contact form — we'd be delighted to explore a pre-launch partnership.




### How do I connect my purchased domain?


Connecting your domain is simple. Once you've signed up for your Rivaa site, our setup guide will walk you through updating your DNS records. If you need a hand, our support team is just a message away and happy to help.
















Where tradition meets timeless elegance — Rivaa crafts heirloom-worthy jewelry for life's most radiant moments.

## Return Policy

URL: https://rivaa-8a11df7f.zappy5.app/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - Rivaa


































































- Products Products




- Home
- Brand Story
- Preview Gallery
- Contact
0













Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 7/12/2026



At Rivaa, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://rivaa-8a11df7f.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Products Products




- Home
- Brand Story
- Preview Gallery
- Contact
0















# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  7/12/2026



Rivaa ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Rivaa

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://rivaa-8a11df7f.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Products Products




- Home
- Brand Story
- Preview Gallery
- Contact
0















# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  July 12, 2026



Rivaa is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Rivaa

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.















Where tradition meets timeless elegance — Rivaa crafts heirloom-worthy jewelry for life's most radiant moments.

## Terms & Conditions

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  July 12, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Rivaa

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Jewelry & Accessories provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Rivaa provides Jewelry & Accessories through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Rivaa. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Rivaa

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
